ark_channels_identity_key_unique.name: ark_channels_identity_key_unique
ark_channels_identity_key_unique.where: "ark"."channels"."identity_key" is not null and "ark"."channels"."deleted_at" is null

ark_channels_thread_owner_check.name: ark_channels_thread_owner_check
ark_channels_thread_owner_check.value:
("ark"."channels"."kind" = 'thread' and "ark"."channels"."thread_parent_channel_id" is not null and "ark"."channels"."thread_root_message_id" is not null)
    or ("ark"."channels"."kind" <> 'thread' and "ark"."channels"."thread_parent_channel_id" is null and "ark"."channels"."thread_root_message_id" is null)

ark_fields_collection_slot_unique.name: ark_fields_collection_slot_unique
ark_fields_collection_slot_unique.where: "ark"."fields"."slot_kind" is not null and "ark"."fields"."slot_index" is not null

ark_grants_subject_check.name: ark_grants_subject_check
ark_grants_subject_check.value:
("ark"."grants"."subject_type" in ('anon', 'authenticated') and "ark"."grants"."subject_id" is null)
    or ("ark"."grants"."subject_type" in ('ark_user', 'role', 'membership') and "ark"."grants"."subject_id" is not null)
